creator: freebsd@marino.st
text:
Fetch fails on DragonFly and FreeBSD: http://portsmon.freebsd.org/portoverview.py?category=devel&portname=py-demjson

It seems tarball was rerolled.

Fix: 

Review changes from old tarball and new one, then regenerate distfile.   Optionally inform upstream of the damage rerolling causes and request they don't do it anymore, but release a uniquely named file instead.

Just respond to this PR rather than submit a fix in a new PR.
